capability: native tool/function calling — REQUIRES tool-call branch or tool/ipython control tokens in THIS model template

harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-3b

evidence.summary: e2e behavioral battery on Metal (qa/capability/tools_smoke.sh, Apple M4): tools rendered into the model template on input, output parsed back to OpenAI tool_calls — 3/3 triggering prompts produced finish_reason="tool_calls" with structurally-valid calls (function name + JSON-string arguments, content emptied); tool_choice:"none" suppresses parsing (content retained, finish_reason "stop"). 3B arguments are semantically correct (get_weather -> {"city":"Paris"}/{"city":"Tokyo"}, add -> {"a":17,"b":25}). Capability template-expressed and driven on the Metal backend. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_tools_out/llama-3.2-3b/p1.json, p2.json, p3.json, none.json.
